description: Exposed Core is the base module of JetBrains Exposed, a Kotlin SQL/ORM framework that provides the type-safe SQL DSL, table and column model, expressions, statements, and vendor dialect abstractions. It supplies the shared schema and query-building primitives used by the Exposed JDBC/R2DBC and DAO modules to work with relational databases from Kotlin applications.

Exposed Core is the base module of JetBrains Exposed, a Kotlin SQL/ORM framework for building type-safe database code. It provides the SQL DSL primitives, schema and table model, expressions, statements, and dialect abstractions used by Exposed's JDBC, R2DBC, and DAO modules.
